Report online reads: At 23.26 hours on 13 April 1942 the Empire Progress (Master Thomas S. Hewitt), dispersed from convoy ON-80, was hit by one of two torpedoes from U-402 south of Cape Race. The torpedo was a dud but the ship stopped nevertheless and was missed with a first coup de grÃ¢ce at 00.17 hours.
